title: ISC Symposium Command

fields.vision: The ISC Symposium Command Room is a MuranoOS handoff packet for Nik Murano's academic symposium strategy work — a lossless environment for selecting the right symposium project, producing materials, rehearsing Q&A against recruiter objections, and converting symposium presence into actual recruiter interest at CIA / DIA / NSA / FFRDC targets.
fields.mechanism: , state the backend/frontend or packet components, and decide whether the handoff is ready for engineering, public explanation, or archival retention
fields.source_utilization: Discovery, creativity, systems thinking, and project generation. Use source library creativity/innovation/network sources to professionalize the project-development account. Vision: Explain Nexus and Personal OS as project-development and discovery infrastructure, not miscellaneous personal tooling. Mechanism: Extract creativity, network, learning, imagination, leadership, and project-generation mechanisms. Plan: Rewrite Nexus and planning pages around upstream/downstream project movement. Status: source library identified as candidate scholarly support; direct quotation requires exact passage review. Remaining gap: Need exact project-method and creativity passages. Source pool: 151 deduplicated local title candidates; 154 catalogue support rows. Examples: Creativity Research; The Heritage, Creativity and Innovation Nexus. Writing, rhetoric, narrative design, visual culture, and presentation. Use source library writing/visual/cinema sources to strengthen public exposition and Trilogy visual/storytelling logic. Vision: Make public pages read as curated intellectual exhibits rather than dashboards. Mechanism: Extract narrative sequencing, visual perception, close reading, rhetoric, style, cinema, and presentation mechanisms. Plan: Apply after domain-source routing so style clarifies evidence rather than masking weak evidence. Status: source library identified as candidate scholarly support; direct quotation requires exact passage review. Remaining gap: Need selective close-reading before adopting style doctrine. Source pool: 64 deduplicated local title candidates; 61 catalogue support rows. Examples: Narrative and Narration: Analyzing Cinematic Storytelling; Camera Lucida. source library scholarly-source routing with author correction. Raw filenames often append Nik_Murano and are not treated as authorship evidence. Catalogue rows are preferred for authors...
fields.plan: How this briefing says the vision should be accomplished, translated into a public project route. When to reach for this: You need to stand up a MuranoOS room to manage an academic/IC symposium campaign end-to-end — from project candidate scoring through work product production through Q&A rehearsal to recruiter conversion at specific IC targets (CIA/DIA/NSA/FFRDC). Or you want to track "recruiter impact" as a first-class metric alongside academic gate progress. Entry point: README.md — 00_room_manifest.json — docs/01_protocol_conformance.md — ui/01_screen_blueprints.md — registry/01_command_registry.json — ops/03_cold_start_instructions.md. Hydrate with the six seed JSONs. Integration target: MuranoOS desktop app. Register under strategy, portfolio, and presentation per the protocol conformance doc. Wire or preserve the implementation files: Schema + manifest + command registry + seeds only. No React/Rust scaffold. Test stubs in markdown (tests/01_test_harness_stubs.md). Cold-start instructions in ops/03_cold_start_instructions.md explain how to initialize the room with the seed data. Export pack spec at exports/01_export_pack_spec.md — defines the "export packet" work product that aggregates room content for advisor/committee/recruiter consumption.
fields.remaining_gaps: Retain the packet as a completed authority layer, then decide whether it should remain a reference file or become a live room, method page, or public proof object.
fields.detailed_source_vision: The ISC Symposium Command Room is a MuranoOS handoff packet for Nik Murano's academic symposium strategy work — a lossless environment for selecting the right symposium project, producing materials, rehearsing Q&A against recruiter objections, and converting symposium presence into actual recruiter interest at CIA / DIA / NSA / FFRDC targets. Its canonical default active project is "I&W Architecture for Cognitive Operations (Signals-to-Decisions Pipeline)" — the specific capstone project being pitched. This is a strategy + project-management + work product-production + interview-prep room fused. Its screens cover the whole pipeline: Command Overview (active project + gate progress + panel readiness + recruiter impact + open risks + next critical decision), Strategic Logic Repository (insights + filters + linked work products + linked decisions), Project Arena (sortable matrix + radar scoring + archive/reject toggles), Project Forge (thesis lock + claims...

maintenance_rule: Update this blueprint before strengthening public claims on the website. Do not use word count, module count, or status percentage as a substitute for concrete project substance.
claim_ceiling_rule: Public claims may rise only when the built components, source use, status, and remaining gaps are updated here and reflected in the rendered page.

public_standard_check.Vision: This document supports the public account of Blueprint by preserving the project purpose, reader-facing claim, and professional-portfolio role.
public_standard_check.Mechanism: It connects source material, project components, implementation state, and next actions so the work can be inspected rather than merely asserted.
public_standard_check.What is built: The supporting evidence is the named page, blueprint, packet, project file, source record, or implementation page described in the document.
public_standard_check.Source use: Sources are used as method and source background, domain grounding, or project history; direct quotation and stronger factual claims require passage-level review.
public_standard_check.Plan: Bind claims to exact source anchors, visible implementation evidence, or a narrower public claim.
public_standard_check.Status: Current support record for the professional package unless explicitly marked archival.
public_standard_check.Remaining Gaps: Passage-level source check, implementation verification, citation cleanup, and proportional public wording remain open where evidence is incomplete.
